scripts.dev: npm run sync:public && ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro dev
scripts.build: npm run sync:public && ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro build && node scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs && pagefind --site dist
scripts.parity: node scripts/check-source-excerpts.mjs && node scripts/parity-check.mjs && node scripts/check-dist-links.mjs
